name: geometry_controls
label: Workbench Geometry
description: Adjust the JustinSDK base plate and crown before the local workbench pose is applied

name: hex_radius
description: Hexagon radius used by the workbench plate

name: hex_spacing
description: Spacing between hex cells in the plate

name: hex_count
description: Number of concentric hex rings in the plate

name: plate_height
description: Extrusion height of the workbench plate

name: crown_outer_radius
description: Outer radius of the JustinSDK starburst crown

name: crown_inner_radius
description: Inner radius of the starburst crown

name: crown_points
description: Point count for the crown profile

name: crown_height
description: Height parameter for the starburst crown

name: presentation_controls
label: Workbench Pose
description: Presentation transforms applied after the workpiece is composed

name: yaw_deg
description: Rotate the workpiece around the Z axis

name: workbench_offset
description: Offset the workpiece in X, Y, and Z
